scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:vercel: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build:vercel && pnpm --filter @workspace/agenario run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.cpSync('artifacts/agenario/dist', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
